description:
Buzzvil’s dynamic reward Ad platform divides the user segments based on users’ activity, and uses the results for advertising. Learn how Buzzvil collects event data through Amazon EKS, Amazon SQS, Amazon Lambda, and Amazon S3 then process data using Amazon Athena, and provide segment information through Amazon RDS and Amazon DynamoDB. In addition, Buzzvil will introduce a plan to automatically update this Data Catalog management through AWS Glue and change the meta information used in the segment rules for Amazon Athena.

Check out more resources for architecting in the #AWS​​​​​ cloud: 
http://amzn.to/2ZIbygO

#AWS #ThisIsMyArchitecture
fulltitle: Buzzvil: Segment Processing and Provision for Ad Recommendation (Korean)
